# RC2 testing notice

- The original v0.2.0-RC2 ZIP is discarded and must not be used.
- v0.2.x remains under test until v1.0.0.
- BindHosts must be disabled and the device rebooted before enabling RC2 or later hotfixes because simultaneous DNS/hosts hooks can cause connectivity loss or bootloop.
- KernelSU Next users may need Hybrid Mount enabled followed by a reboot.
